title: draba crassifolia
intro: Draba crassifolia, also known as rock cress or white draba, is a small, annual or biennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Draba crassifolia can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
